_doc: Curated operator labels per chain. Keys are chain-specific identifiers, values are human-readable operator names. Used to override or supplement labels returned by native APIs. Keys prefixed with `_` are documentation and ignored by the loader.

_provenance.SOLANA: Validator identity pubkeys + names pulled from the stakewiz.com API on 2026-05-28. Coverage is the first 40 validators returned by that endpoint — top-stake operators (Helius, Coinbase, Triton, Jito, Marinade etc.) are not yet covered; add them manually as you encounter them in the panel.
_provenance.AVALANCHE_C: Tried Glacier and AvaScan APIs (2026-05-28) — neither exposes operator names on validator endpoints. Populate manually from the AvaScan UI's per-validator pages or community label lists as you identify big operators. Keys must include the 'P-' prefix to match what platform.getCurrentValidators returns.
_provenance.POLYGON: The Polygon Staking API names nearly every validator natively, so this file is reserved for fixing the small number of `Anonymous N` and empty-name entries returned by the API. None are currently overridden — anonymous validators show as their API-reported `Anonymous N` label.

SOLANA._key_format: Solana validator identity pubkey (the 'nodePubkey' from getVoteAccounts)

AVALANCHE_C._key_format: Avalanche P-Chain reward address as returned by platform.getCurrentValidators (e.g. 'P-avax1...' — note the 'P-' prefix is included)

POLYGON._key_format: Polygon validator owner address, lowercase hex
